mapper.sql: select a.id, a.plan_id, a.description, a.actual_qty, a.actual_hours, a.issues, a.status, a.submitted_at, a.del_flag, a.create_by, a.create_time, a.update_by, a.update_time, a.remark, su.user_name, sd.dept_name, p.title as plan_title, p.plan_type, p.priority as plan_priority, p.quant_target as plan_quant_target from achievement a left join sys_user su on a.create_by = su.login_name left join sys_dept sd on su.dept_id = sd.dept_id left join plan p on a.plan_id = p.id
mapper.insert: insert into achievement (plan_id, description, actual_qty, actual_hours, issues, status, submitted_at, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{planId}, #{description}, #{actualQty}, #{actualHours}, #{issues}, #{status}, #{submittedAt}, '0', #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.update: update achievement set del_flag = '2', update_time = sysdate() where id = #{id}
